title: grewia boehmiana
intro: Grewia boehmiana, also known as the African Plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Grewia boehmiana include its ability to improve immune function, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's bark and fruit are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
